label: Think tree
description: Defines a pawn AI decision tree rooted at a recursive ThinkNode graph.

thinkRoot.label: Think root
thinkRoot.description: Root ThinkNode for this AI tree. The Class attribute selects the concrete node type.

insertTag.label: Insert tag
insertTag.description: Tag used by ThinkNode_SubtreesByTag insertion hooks to select this tree.

insertPriority.label: Insert priority
insertPriority.description: Sort priority for trees matched by an insertion tag. Higher values run earlier.
